title: Tool
description: A tool specification — handlers for mouse/keyboard events, tool-local state, and an optional render overlay. Each tool YAML file in workspace/tools/ must match this schema.

id.description: Tool identifier. Must match the filename stem.

cursor.description: CSS cursor name or a custom cursor defined in theme.

menu_label.description: Human-readable label shown in tool-switcher menus.

shortcut.description: Keyboard shortcut that activates this tool (single char or chord).

platform.description: Platform filter. Omit for all platforms.

tool_options_dialog.description: Id of a dialog in workspace/dialogs/ that opens when the user double-clicks this tool's icon in the toolbar. The toolbar dispatches dialog.open with this id.

tool_options_panel.description: Id of a panel in workspace/panels/ that the toolbar shows / focuses when the user double-clicks this tool's icon. Parallel to tool_options_dialog: dialog destinations are modal (Reset / Cancel / OK), panel destinations are persistent. Use one or the other, not both.

tool_options_action.description: Id of an action in workspace/actions.yaml that the toolbar invokes when the user double-clicks this tool's icon. Used by tools whose dblclick destination is a one-shot action rather than a dialog or panel — e.g. the Hand tool's fit_active_artboard and the Zoom tool's zoom_to_actual_size. Mutually exclusive with tool_options_dialog and tool_options_panel.

tool_options_dialog_on_alt_click.description: When true, an Alt-click on canvas opens the dialog referenced by tool_options_dialog. Used by the transform-tool family (Scale, Rotate, Shear) — the same click also writes state.transform_reference_point. Per SCALE_TOOL.md §Tool Options dialog.

state.description: Tool-local state slots. Namespaced as $tool.<id>.* in expressions.

default.description: Default value — any JSON scalar or object.

enum.description: Optional enumeration of valid values. Validator checks all writes against this list if specified.

handlers.description: Event handlers. Each key is an event name; value is an effect list.

overlay.description: Tool overlay drawn into the canvas overlay layer each frame. Either a single {if, render} object (most tools) or a list of such objects evaluated in order (transform tools, which compose the reference-point cross with the drag-time bbox ghost). Each entry's `if` expression gates that entry independently.

if.description: Expression evaluated each frame; overlay renders when truthy.

render.description: Render spec — element type + attributes. Any expression-valued field is evaluated per frame.

if.description: Expression evaluated each frame; this overlay layer renders when truthy.

render.description: Render spec for this overlay layer.
